package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for range_copy_large_struct: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `for _, v := range largeStructSlice` where the struct is > 64 bytes
type CaseRangeCopyLargeStructDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRangeCopyLargeStructModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRangeCopyLargeStructRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRangeCopyLargeStructModel
}

type CaseRangeCopyLargeStructService struct {
    repo *CaseRangeCopyLargeStructRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRangeCopyLargeStructAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveRangeCopyLargeStruct(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRangeCopyLargeStructDTO) error {
    focus := "range_copy_large_struct"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    range_copy_large_struct_positive := map[string]int{"range": 1, "copy": 2, "large": 3, "struct": 4}
    range_copy_large_struct_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    range_positive_0 := range_copy_large_struct_positive["range"] + len(input)
    _ = range_positive_0
    copy_positive_1 := range_copy_large_struct_positive["copy"] + len(input)
    _ = copy_positive_1
    large_positive_2 := range_copy_large_struct_positive["large"] + len(input)
    _ = large_positive_2
    struct_positive_3 := range_copy_large_struct_positive["struct"] + len(input)
    _ = struct_positive_3
    return nil
}
